verses.text: “Hihte pen, leitungah na nuntak laiteng uh Topa, na pu na pate uh Pasian in na neih dingun no hong piaksa gam sungah limtakin na zuih ding uh thukhamte leh ngeina kipte ahi hi
Na suankhiat ding uh minamte in a biakna mun mual sangte tung leh mual neute tung leh singniim nuai, mun khempeuh na susia taktak ding uh hi

Amaute' biakna taute phelkhia-in, a biakna songte dengzanin, amaute' Asherah milimte mei tawh na hal ding uh hi. A kiseek amau' pasian-te' limte na phukpai ding uh a, tua mun panin amau' min na maimangsak ding uh hi
“Ahih hangin Topa na Pasian uh tungah tua bangin na hih kei ding uh hi
Topa na Pasian un na minam khempeuh uh sung panin ama min koihna dingin teelin, ama omna dinga a bawlna mun na zong ding uh hi

Tua lai-ah na pai ding uh a, na meihal biaknate uh leh na biakpiaknate uh, note in na piak uh sawmah khat leh na piak thuahte uh, thuciamna biakpiakna, utthu-a na piakna, na bawnghon tacilte uh leh na tuuhon tacilte uh tua lai-ah na paipih ding uh hi
Topa na Pasian uh mai tua lai munah na ne ding uh a, Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong piakna hangin na hihna khempeuh uhah note leh na innkuanpihte na lungdam ding uh hi
“Tua hun ciangin mi khempeuh in ama hoihsak bangin a gamtat ngei ciat bangin na gamta nawn kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un note hong piak tawlngakna leh luahna-ah na tung nai kei uh hi

Ahih hangin Jordan galkhatah pai-in, Topa na Pasian un luah dingin note hong piak leitangah tengin, nuamtakin na nuntak theihna dingun na kiim uha na langte khempeuh uh kiang panin tawlngakna hong piak ciangin

Topa na Pasian un ama min omna ding munin a teelna munah note kong sawl khempeuh na paipih ding uh hi. Na meihal biaknate uh leh na biakpiaknate uh, note in na piak uh sawmah khat leh na piak thuahte uh leh Topa' tungah na ciam uh na thuciam piaknate uh na paipih ding uh hi

Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah note leh na tapate uh leh na tanute uh, na nasem numeite uh leh na nasem pasalte uh, leh note' neih bangin tanh ahi a, luah ahi zongin a neilo na khuasung uha om Levi mite tawh lungdam khawm un
Na tuahna mun peuh uhah na meihal biaknate uh na piaklohna dingun kingaihsun un
Na minamte uh sung panin Topa in a teelna mun khatah na meihal biaknate uh pia-in, note kong thupiakte khempeuh tua lai munah na hih ding uh hi

“Ahi zongin, Topa na Pasian un note tungah hong piak thupha tawh kizui-in na khuapite uh khat peuhpeuh sungah sa na deih zahzah uh go-in na ne thei ding uh hi. Sanang leh sakhitalte a kinek mah bangin mi a nin leh a siang kideidan loin na ne thei ding uh hi
A si na ne kei bek ding uh hi; tui bangin leitungah a si na bua ding uh hi

Na an uh sawmah khat ahi a, na leenggahzu uh ahi a, na sathau uh ahi zongin, na bawnghon uh leh na tuuhonte uh sung pan tacilte ahi zongin, na kiciamna uh ahi na thuciam uh biakpiakna khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, utthu-a na piakte uh ahi zongin, nomau' piak thuahte ahi zongin na khuapite uh sungah na ne thei kei ding uh hi

Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah note leh na tapate leh na tanute, na nasem numeite leh na nasem pasalte, leh na khuapite uh sunga om Levi mite in Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah na ne ding uh hi. Na hihna khempeuh uhah Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah na lungdam ding uh hi
Na gamsung uhah na ten' laiteng uh Levi mite na mangngilh lohna dingun kingaihsun un
“No tungah hong ciamsa bangin Topa na Pasian un na gamgi uh hong sotsak ciangin, sa na duh manun, ‘Sa ka ne ding uh hi,’ na cih uh leh, na duh zahzah uh sa na ne thei ding uh hi

Topa na Pasian un ama min koihna dingin a teelna mun pen note kiang panin a gamla lua ahih leh, note kong thupiaksa bangin Topa in no hong piaksa na bawnghon uh pan ahi a, na tuuhon uh pan ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh na go thei ding uh a, na duh zahzah uh na khuasung uhah na ne thei ding uh hi
Sanang ahi a, sakhital ahi zongin a kinek mah bangin na ne thei ding uh a, mi a nin leh a siang kideidan loin a kibangin na ne thei ding uh hi
A si na nekloh ding uh theitel un. Bang hang hiam cih leh si pen nuntakna hi a, nuntakna pen sa tawh na ne khawm kei ding uh hi
Si na ne kei ding uh a, tui bangin leitungah na buakhia ding uh hi
Topa' muhna-ah a manin na gamtat uh ciangin note leh note' khit cianga na tate uh a nopsak theihna dingin si na ne kei ding uh hi
Ahih hangin na bat uh a siangtho nate leh na thuciamna uh na piaknate uh note in la-in Topa in a teelna munah na paipih ding uh a

Topa na Pasian uh biakna tau tungah na meihal biakna uh, a sa leh a si na pia ding uh hi. Na biakpiakna uh site Topa note' Pasian' biakna tau tungah kibuakhia ding a, ahih hangin a sa na ne thei ding uh hi
Topa na Pasian uh muhna-ah a hoih leh a manin na gamtat uh ciangin note leh note' khit cianga na tate uh a nopsak theihna dingin note kong thupiak khempeuh na kin ding uh limtakin ngaihsun un.
“ Topa na Pasian un na mai panun na suankhiat ding uh minamte beimang sakin, amaute suankhia-in amau' leitangah na ten' uh ciangin

na mai uhah amaute a kisuksiat khit ciangin amaute zui-in na awk khaklohna ding uh leh, ‘Kei zong amau' hih bangin ka hih theihna dingin hih minamte in a pasian-te uh bangci biak ahi uh hiam?’ ci-in a pasian-te uh thu na kanlohna dingun kingaihsun un

Topa na Pasian uh tungah tua bangin na hih kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a muhdah a kihhuai nam khempeuh amaute in a pasian-te uh-a' dingin hih uh hi. A pasian-te uh-a' dingin a tapate uh leh a tanute nangawn uh mei sungah a hal uh hi
“Note kong thupiak khempeuh na hih ding uh na lim ngaihsut ding uh hi. Na behlap kei ding uh a, zong na khiam kei ding uh hi.
